name: Bravida Holding AB (publ)
summary: Bravida Holding AB (publ) provides technical services and installations for buildings and industrial facilities in Sweden, Norway, Denmark, and Finland. The company offers installation services for the new construction and refurbishment of technical systems in buildings, facilities, and infrastructure; and operation and maintenance services, as well as undertakes minor upgrade works. It also provides technical and installation services for electrical, heating, and plumbing systems, as well as heating, ventilation, and air conditioning systems in buildings and commercial facilities; and installs and services security and sprinkler systems, cooling and power facilities, lifts, solar panels, and services within project management, technical service management, energy optimization, technical property service, and uninterrupted technical infrastructure. The company primarily serves property owners, public sector, professional tenants, building contractors, and industrial companies. Bravida Holding AB (publ) was founded in 1922 and is headquartered in Stockholm, Sweden.
